payload.title: R0005 refinement: recognise // Safety: in doc comments at fn scope
payload.description: FP audit: R0005 fired 86 times against anyhow because anyhow uses paragraph-style '// Safety:' prose in the enclosing unsafe fn's doc comment, not per-block '// safety:' lines within 200 bytes of the unsafe block. The strict rule is legitimate but produces a stylistic clash. Look in the enclosing unsafe fn's doc comments before failing.
